title: Feacalis_colony_PCR
steps: Transfer 1 colony, depending on size to 50-100µLwater. Normal size colonies can go in ~65µLwater.

To a PCR tube add: 15 µL colony water* 1.25 µL primer 1 (20 µM stock) 1.25 µL primer 2 (20 µM stock) 2.5 µL10X thermopolbuffer 0.5 µL10 mM dNTPs 0.5 µL Taq polymerase 4 µL water Total = 25 µL *Master mix can be made with all ingredients except the colony water for multiple reactions using the same primers.
Use the following cycle in the thermocycler: 94°C 10 min 1 cycle 94°C 15 sec 54°C 30sec(5°C below Tm) 72°C 1 min/kb 25-30 cycles 72°C 10 min 1 cycle 15°C HOLD
creator: Eadewunm
